title: Workspace Creation Manifest
description: Contract for a WorkspaceToolkit workspace-creation manifest (manifests/<type>.json). Consumed by the new-workspace tooling to scaffold a workspace from its template repo.

$schema.description: URL of this schema, enabling editor autocomplete and validation.

name.description: Manifest identifier, matching the manifests/<name>.json file name.

displayName.description: Human-readable workspace name shown to the operator.

description.description: Summary of the workspace this manifest creates.

repo.description: The GitHub template repository this workspace is created from.

branching.description: Branching model configuration for the created workspace.

model.description: The default branching model for the workspace.

allowedBranchingModels.description: Branching models the operator may choose from for this workspace.

deliverBranchingDocs.description: Whether to deliver branching-guidelines docs into the created workspace.

branchingLayer.description: Optional override for the branching layer name to apply. When omitted, the layer is derived from the model as "branching-<model>". A content/vault template sets this to "branching-content-vault" because its git topology is trunk-based but it ships the content-repo branching layer to a vault path rather than the code-repo docs/ path.

libraries.description: Optional. Selectable library families (e.g. IoC, testing, mocking) offered during workspace creation. Present only on manifests that offer library choices.

families.description: Map of family name to its selectable members and default.

members.description: Selectable library names in this family.

default.description: The default member, or null when the family is optional with no default.

optional.description: Whether selecting a member of this family is optional.

tokens.description: Substitution tokens resolved during workspace creation.

required.description: Whether a value must be supplied for this token.

source.description: Where the token value comes from (e.g. 'parameter:Name'). Optional.

default.description: Default value when none is supplied. Optional.

prompt.description: Prompt text shown to the operator when soliciting the value. Optional.

postCreateSteps.description: Named post-creation steps to run after scaffolding. Empty array means none.

templateOnlyPaths.description: Paths that exist in the template repo but must not be copied into a created workspace.

prerequisites.description: External tools required to create or use this workspace.

check.description: Shell command that verifies the tool is present.

remediation.description: Command or instruction to install the tool if the check fails.

summary.description: Post-creation guidance shown to the operator.
